hero.title: Awọn ọna šiše imọ-ẹrọ ti o ṣe iwọn
hero.subtitle: Sọfitiwia Idawọlẹ · AI ati Ẹkọ Ẹrọ · Awọn amayederun awọsanma · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Lati adaṣe ọlọgbọn si awọn iru ẹrọ abinibi awọsanma, a ṣe apẹrẹ ati fi imọ-ẹrọ ti o ni agbara awọn iṣowo ti o ni agbara — ni akoko, lori isuna, ni iwọn.
hero.trustLine: Igbẹkẹle nipasẹ awọn ile-iṣẹ ni agbaye

services.subtitle: Awọn iṣẹ wa
services.title: Imọ-ẹrọ Imọ-ẹrọ ni kikun
services.description: Awọn agbegbe adaṣe mẹfa. Ẹgbẹ kan. Gbogbo fẹlẹfẹlẹ ti akopọ imọ-ẹrọ rẹ — lati awọn ẹrọ eti si awọn dasibodu ile-iṣẹ.

customSoftware.title: Aṣa Software Development
customSoftware.description: Awọn ohun elo igbalode ti a kọ pẹlu awọn microservices, awọn API, ati faaji abinibi awọsanma.

aiMl.title: AI, ML ati Oye Iṣowo
aiMl.description: Awọn opo gigun ti AI / ML, awọn dasibodu Power BI, ati awọn atupale to ti ni ilọsiwaju ti o yi data pada si awọn ipinnu.

cloud.title: Awọsanma faaji ati amayederun
cloud.description: Awọn amayederun awọsanma pupọ pẹlu awọn apoti, ti ko ni olupin, ati iwọntunwọnsi agbaye ti a ṣe sinu.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Awọn ẹrọ ti a sopọ, awọn ibeji oni-nọmba, ati iširo eti fun Ile-iṣẹ 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: Awọn opo gigun ti CI / CD, amayederun bi koodu, ati akiyesi lati ṣe si iṣelọpọ.

digital.title: Iyipada Digital ati Ijumọsọrọ
digital.description: Ilana imọ-ẹrọ, awọn ọna opopona igbalode, ati ijumọsọrọ ọwọ.

cta.title: Jẹ ki a kọ nkan ti o ṣe pataki.
cta.description: Lati idagbasoke sọfitiwia aṣa ati awọn solusan ti o ni agbara AI si awọn amayederun awọsanma ati adaṣe — a pese awọn iṣẹ imọ-ẹrọ opin-si-opin ti a ṣe deede si awọn ibeere rẹ.

credibility.subtitle: Wa Track Record
credibility.title: Awọn abajade, kii ṣe <gradient>awọn ileri</gradient>
credibility.titlePlain: Awọn abajade, kii ṣe awọn ileri
credibility.description: Lati Sarajevo si Oslo, Amsterdam ati Berlin. Awọn ile-iṣẹ ti a firanṣẹ ni akoko, ni gbogbo igba.

stats.experience: Awọn ọdun ti o ni iriri
stats.countries: Àwọn orílẹ̀-èdè tí wọ́n ń sìn
stats.systems: Awọn ọna šiše ti a firanṣẹ

atlascopco.label: Awọsanma IAM fun Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Ṣe agbekalẹ awọn amayederun Idanimọ Ọkan ti o da lori awọsanma akọkọ fun Atlas Copco lori Azure Kubernetes, idinku awọn idiyele lakoko mimu ibamu ile-iṣẹ.

orange.label: Syeed Cyberdefense Orange
orange.outcome: Ṣe agbekalẹ awọn amayederun Azure Kubernetes, awọn opo gigun CI / CD, ati iṣọpọ ServiceNow aṣa fun ile-iṣẹ cybersecurity ti Yuroopu.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Syeed GIS ti a kọ ni awọn ohun elo ipamo kọja Jẹmánì pẹlu iṣawari ikọlu ti o ṣe idiwọ ibajẹ amayederun miliọnu Euro pupọ.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub ti n ṣakoso ẹgbẹẹgbẹrun awọn ẹrọ, Synapse ṣiṣe awọn ọkẹ àìmọye ti awọn ila telemetry, pẹlu akopọ eti gige awọn idiyele ifiranṣẹ nipasẹ ~ 90%.

drone.label: Syeed Drone adase
drone.outcome: Oludari ọkọ ofurufu aṣa pẹlu afara 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub ti o jẹ ki awọn ọkọ ofurufu BVLOS adase fun ibojuwo ogbin ati ifijiṣẹ isanwo.

payment.label: Owo System Rescue
payment.outcome: Ti o ti fipamọ ẹnu-ọna isanwo ti o kuna fun ohun elo alagbeka Norwegian nipasẹ yiyipada-imọ-ẹrọ koodu ti ko ni iwe-aṣẹ. Akoko isanwo odo lẹhin igbalode.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Kọ ohun itanna Maya ti o ge awoṣe 3D ati akoko iwara nipasẹ 50% ni ile-iṣẹ AAA pataki kan, ti a gba bi ọpa boṣewa ninu opo gigun ti iṣelọpọ.

social.label: Syeed Awujọ ti o da lori Ipo
social.outcome: Ohun elo ibaṣepọ ti a ṣe apẹrẹ fun aaye igbesi aye alẹ ti Ilu Sipeeni pẹlu ibaramu geolocation, fifiranṣẹ akoko gidi, ati awọn iwifunni titari fun alabara UK kan.

iga.label: Syeed IGA Ọpọlọpọ-Tenant
iga.outcome: Kọ ẹhin mojuto fun pẹpẹ iṣakoso idanimọ awọsanma ti n sin awọn alabara Fortune 500 pẹlu aṣa ASP.NET Core Identity fun NoSQL ni ipele ile-iṣẹ.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Ifijiṣẹ Agbaye
euAdjacent.description: Awọn wakati iṣẹ CET pẹlu iriri ti o kọja Norway, Netherlands, Jẹmánì, ati kọja.

yourEngineers.title: Awọn onimọ-ẹrọ rẹ, kii ṣe olutaja
yourEngineers.description: Awọn ọmọ ẹgbẹ ẹgbẹ ifiṣootọ ti a fi sinu iṣẹ rẹ ati awọn irinṣẹ. Ko si awọn alakoso akọọlẹ, ko si awọn ila tikẹti.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware si awọsanma
hardwareToCloud.description: Lati famuwia ẹrọ ti a fi sii si awọn opo gigun ti ile-iṣẹ Azure Synapse. Full-stack software kọja gbogbo fẹlẹfẹlẹ.

partners.subtitle: Akopọ Imọ-ẹrọ
partners.title: <gradient>Akopọ</gradient> Idanwo Ogun
partners.description: A ko lo awọn irinṣẹ wọnyi nikan — a ti firanṣẹ awọn eto iṣelọpọ pẹlu wọn. Lati Microsoft Azure si Kubernetes, awọn onise-ẹrọ wa ni imọ-ẹrọ gidi-aye.

cloudInfra.label: Awọsanma ati amayederun
cloudInfra.description: Faaji awọsanma pupọ pẹlu orchestration eiyan ati awọn amayederun bi koodu.

frontend.label: Iwaju iwaju
frontend.description: Modern paati frameworks pẹlu iru ailewu ati iṣapeye kọ tooling.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Awọn iru ẹrọ olupin ile-iṣẹ, awọn ede eto, ati awọn ilana API igbalode.

data.label: Data & Ibi ipamọ
data.description: Awọn ile itaja ibatan, iwe, ati awọn ile itaja iranti pẹlu wiwa ọrọ ni kikun.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: Awọn opo gigun CI / CD, iṣakoso ẹya, ati iṣelọpọ Olùgbéejáde.

cloudNative.title: Õî÷ó ïîìî÷ü, ÷òî ó ìåíÿ íåò íèêàêèõ
cloudNative.description: Gbogbo ise agbese ti wa ni containerized, CI / CD-ìṣó, ati itumọ ti fun petele asekale lati ọjọ akọkọ.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Lati React frontends si awọn microservices .NET si awọn iṣupọ Kubernetes — ẹgbẹ kan, opin si opin.

productionProven.title: Iṣelọpọ-Fihan
productionProven.description: Iwọnyi kii ṣe awọn imọ-ẹrọ demo. Ọpa kọọkan ti a ṣe akojọ ṣe agbara awọn ọna ṣiṣe gidi ti n ṣiṣẹ awọn olumulo gidi loni.

faq.subtitle: Imọ Base
faq.title: Awọn <gradient>ibeere</gradient> ti a beere nigbagbogbo
faq.titlePlain: Awọn ibeere ti a beere nigbagbogbo
faq.description: Ohun gbogbo ti o nilo lati mọ nipa ṣiṣẹ pẹlu Horizon Tech

scope.question: Kini aaye iṣẹ rẹ?
scope.answer: A fi awọn iṣẹ imọ-ẹrọ opin-si-opin ranṣẹ: sọfitiwia ile-iṣẹ aṣa, awọn opo gigun AI / ML, awọn amayederun awọsanma, awọn ọna ṣiṣe IoT, adaṣe DevOps, ati ijumọsọrọ iyipada oni-nọmba. Boya o nilo pẹpẹ kikun ti a kọ lati ibẹrẹ tabi iṣọpọ ti a fojusi pẹlu akopọ rẹ ti o wa tẹlẹ, a mu faaji, idagbasoke, idanwo, ati gbigbe.

stack.question: Kini akopọ imọ-ẹrọ ipilẹ rẹ?
stack.answer: Akopọ ipilẹ wa lori awọn iru ẹrọ ile-iṣẹ: Azure ati AWS fun awọsanma, .NET ati Node.js fun backend, React ati Angular fun frontend, Kubernetes ati Docker fun orchestration, ati Terraform fun awọn amayederun bi koodu. A tun ṣiṣẹ lọpọlọpọ pẹlu Python fun awọn iṣẹ AI / ML, Power BI ati Fabric fun oye iṣowo, ati PostgreSQL, SQL Server, ati MongoDB fun data.

enterprise.question: Bawo ni o ṣe ṣe itọju awọn iṣẹ akanṣe ile-iṣẹ?
enterprise.answer: Gbogbo adehun bẹrẹ pẹlu ipele iṣawari lati ṣalaye iwọn, faaji, ati awọn iṣẹlẹ. O gba ẹgbẹ ifiṣootọ pẹlu itọsọna imọ-ẹrọ, awọn atunyẹwo iṣẹlẹ deede, ati iraye si taara si awọn onise-ẹrọ ti o kọ eto rẹ. A tẹle awọn sprints agile pẹlu awọn demos ti awọn alabaṣepọ, ṣetọju awọn igbimọ iṣẹ akanṣe ti o han gbangba, ati pese awọn ijabọ ilọsiwaju ọsẹ.

support.question: Bawo ni atilẹyin lẹhin ifilole ṣe dabi?
support.answer: A nfunni ni awọn ipele atilẹyin ti a ṣeto pẹlu awọn SLA ti a ṣalaye, pẹlu ibojuwo 24/7, idahun iṣẹlẹ, iṣapeye iṣẹ, ati ẹya ẹya. Awọn adehun atilẹyin wa bo awọn atunṣe kokoro, awọn abulẹ aabo, iwọn amayederun, ati awọn sọwedowo ilera ti o ni ilọsiwaju — ti a ṣe deede si akoko rẹ ati awọn ibeere akoko idahun.

integration.question: Ṣe o le ṣepọ pẹlu awọn amayederun wa ti o wa tẹlẹ?
integration.answer: Dajudaju. A ṣe amọja ni isọdọtun ogun, awọn iṣọpọ API-akọkọ, ati awọn iṣipopada awọsanma arabara. Boya o nilo lati sopọ si awọn eto ERP lori agbegbe, ṣilọ lati awọn monoliths si awọn microservices, tabi ṣe afara awọn ibi ipamọ data ti o ni ilọsiwaju pẹlu awọn iwaju igbalode, a ni awọn iwe ere ijira ati iriri iṣọpọ lati jẹ ki o rọrun pupọ.

industries.question: Awọn ile-iṣẹ wo ni o ti ṣiṣẹ ninu?
industries.answer: Ẹgbẹ wa ti fi awọn iṣẹ akanṣe ranṣẹ kọja fintech, ilera, awọn eekaderi, e-commerce, agbara, ati awọn apa ijọba. A loye awọn ibeere ile-iṣẹ kan pato bi PCI-DSS fun awọn sisanwo, awọn ero HIPAA fun data ilera, ibamu GDPR fun awọn ọja EU, ati telemetry akoko gidi fun IoT ile-iṣẹ.

engagement.question: Bawo ni ilana adehun naa ṣe dabi?
engagement.answer: O bẹrẹ pẹlu ipe awari lati ni oye awọn ibi-afẹde rẹ ati imọ-ẹrọ imọ-ẹrọ. Lati ibẹ, a fi iwe scoping kan pẹlu awọn iṣeduro faaji, akoko, ati idinku idoko-owo. Lọgan ti a fọwọsi, a bẹrẹ pẹlu ẹgbẹ ifiṣootọ, sinu awọn irinṣẹ rẹ ati awọn iṣan-iṣẹ, ati bẹrẹ sprint akọkọ laarin awọn ọjọ.

faq.ctaDescription: Ṣe o ni iṣẹ akanṣe kan ni lokan? Jẹ ki a sọrọ nipa akoko, akoko, ati isuna.
